mapper.insert: INSERT INTO memories (room_id, plan_id, writer_id, title, content, memory_date) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{planId}, #{writerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{memoryDate})
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.plan_id, m.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS writer_profile_image_url, m.title, m.content, m.memory_date, m.deleted_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_comments c WHERE c.memory_id = m.id) AS comment_count FROM memories m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.writer_id WHERE m.id = #{memoryId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.plan_id, m.writer_id, u.nickname AS writer_nickname, u.profile_image_url AS writer_profile_image_url, m.title, m.content, m.memory_date, m.deleted_at, m.created_at, m.updated_at FROM memories m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.writer_id WHERE m.plan_id = #{planId} AND m.writer_id = #{writerId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT room_id FROM plans WHERE id = #{planId}
SELECT memory_status FROM plans WHERE id = #{planId}
mapper.update: UPDATE plans SET memory_status = 'WRITTEN' WHERE id = #{planId}
UPDATE memories SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE id = #{memoryId}
mapper.select: SELECT tag FROM memory_tags WHERE memory_id = #{memoryId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT mp.user_id AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image_url AS profile_image_url FROM memory_participants mp JOIN users u ON u.id = mp.user_id WHERE mp.memory_id = #{memoryId} ORDER BY mp.user_id ASC

SELECT mp.memory_id AS memory_id, mp.user_id AS user_id, u.nickname AS nickname, u.profile_image_url AS profile_image_url FROM memory_participants mp JOIN users u ON u.id = mp.user_id WHERE mp.memory_id IN #{id} ORDER BY mp.memory_id ASC, mp.user_id ASC
